title: Spiderchains
description: Spiderchains are a proposed Bitcoin sidechain architecture that uses a network of collateralized multisig operators and Bitcoin transactions to coordinate sidechain state and peg operations.

resources.title: Spiderchain Whitepaper
resources.notes: Primary design reference for the spiderchain architecture.

resources.title: Bitcoin Layer Two Resources
resources.notes: Curated context for spiderchains among Bitcoin layer designs.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for sidechains, multisig, and Bitcoin transaction settlement.
